name: Raspberry Marshmallow Bread
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Red raspberries (frozen), defrosted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first 9 ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Set darkness control at 11 o'clock.
3. Select white bread and push "Start."
4. Add the reserved, well-drained raspberries (2/3 cup) when the breadmaker beeps, approximately 88 minutes into the cycle (33 minutes with Dak Turbo II).
5. Enjoy this delightful recipe with fruit salad or as a cholesterol-free, fiber-filled breakfast treat. Spread toasted slices with Kaplan's Better than Butter.
